prose:
The Fukui reactivity indices for ferrocene were calculated using the GFN2-xTB method. The input geometry was read from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/ferrocene/ferrocene.xyz`. The calculation was performed in the gas phase with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1. The GFN2-xTB method is a semi-empirical tight-binding quantum chemical method, and its accuracy regime is for geometries/conformers/relative trends.

The most electrophilic site is the Iron (Fe) atom, located at atom index 10 (1-based label 11), with a Fukui f+ index of 0.22885456.
The most nucleophilic site is also the Iron (Fe) atom, located at atom index 10 (1-based label 11), with a Fukui f- index of 0.25938191.
The calculation converged successfully.
